message:
Enhance EdgeBox sandbox configuration for all platforms

Sandbox improvements:
- Load dirs from .edgebox.json for WASI preopens
- Set __EDGEBOX_DIRS environment variable for child process sandboxing
- Always preopen /tmp and HOME directory
- Add dirs: /tmp, ~/.claude, ~/.config, ~/.local, ~/.cache, /var/folders

Polyfill enhancements:
- Add Request/Response/Headers classes for Axios fetch adapter
- Add ReadableStream polyfill for streaming support
- Add complete console methods (error, warn, info, debug, trace, etc.)
- Add appendFileSync polyfill
- Fix fetch to handle Request objects as first argument
- Handle Headers.toJSON() for serialization

File system improvements:
- Use createFileAbsolute for absolute paths
- Create parent directories recursively for absolute paths

HTTP bridge fixes:
- Handle Request objects passed to fetch()
- Properly serialize body to string

Config (.edgebox.json):
- macOS: sandbox-exec with Scheme profile
- Linux: bubblewrap (bwrap) with bind mounts
- Windows: Job Objects + Restricted Tokens
